Interface Studio is hiring a Frontend Software Engineer for a permanent product role in Bordeaux or remote within France. The engineer will join a multidisciplinary team of product designers, backend engineers and quality specialists building customer-facing web applications. We welcome candidates with two to four years of frontend development experience.

The role owns responsive user journeys from refinement to production. Responsibilities include developing React and TypeScript interfaces, contributing reusable components to a design system, integrating REST APIs, reviewing pull requests and improving application performance. The engineer will make accessibility part of delivery by applying semantic HTML and WCAG guidance, and will maintain unit, integration and browser tests.

Strong TypeScript, modern React, HTML and CSS skills are required. Experience with Next.js, Storybook, Playwright or Testing Library is valuable, as are performance tools such as Lighthouse and Web Vitals. Candidates should communicate design and engineering trade-offs clearly, collaborate closely with product teams and improve CI quality gates. This is a frontend software role; Python, SQL, data engineering and machine learning are not part of the position.
